records.ety: [L. capitolium, fr. caput head: cf. F. capitole. See Chief.]

defs: The temple of Jupiter, at Rome, on the Mona Capitolinus, where the Senate met.
quotes: Comes Cæsar to the Capitol to-morrow?

defs: The edifice at Washington occupied by the Congress of the United States; also, the building in which the legislature of a State holds its sessions; a statehouse.
